title: Indicator Event
description: Technical indicator calculations emitted by strategies for debugging and analysis. Supports flexible value structures (single values, bands, multiple indicators) with optional metadata.

symbol.description: Security symbol for which indicators were calculated

sleeve_id.description: Optional stable sleeve identifier for isolated ensemble attribution.

timestamp.description: Bar timestamp for which indicators were calculated (ISO 8601 with timezone)

indicators.description: Dictionary of indicator name to value. Values are completely flexible - can be numeric (int/float), boolean, string, array, or nested object. No schema validation on values to support any custom indicator type.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for additional context. Completely flexible structure - use for signal classification, strategy state, debugging info, etc.
